creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
Created attachment 181299
diff update immortal 0.10.5

Fixed return error when immortaldir is failing.

Fixed checkUser to be more verbose, in case of an error.

When using the option -u/user if using a precompiled version this error may appear:

  user: Lookup requires cgo

To fix this, immortal should be compiled from source for the desired platform.
